title: オークスの後に・空っぽ

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Please. I don't need your pity.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You know as well as I do that I completely failed
today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I was supposed to bring home first place!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want it to be true, but it's just like she
said!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
My "number one" is meaningless! I'm good for
nothing but empty words!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Oaks, Daiwa Scarlet vents her honest
feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She needs to reflect on her running and figure out
what she's missing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be time for her to finally confront her
rival.
